about.title: Crafting software that matters
about.bio:
Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience building scalable web applications.
    I specialize in React, TypeScript, and modern backend technologies.
    Passionate about clean code, great UX, and delivering real business value.

funFact.title: Fun fact
funFact.text: Based in Bogotá, Colombia — one of Latin America's fastest-growing tech hubs. I love combining solid engineering fundamentals with modern design sensibilities to build products that users actually enjoy.

achievements: Developed new features using React and JavaScript, ensuring maintainability and scalability.
Backend development with Laravel and PHP, designing and optimizing APIs and business logic.
Technical support and production incident resolution, ensuring stability and operational continuity.
Management and optimization of SQL and MongoDB databases, improving query performance.
Integration of connectors with external systems (SISSA), ensuring correct data synchronization.
Applied SOLID and Clean Code principles across all development work.
Led development of internal platforms with React, TypeScript and Firebase under SOLID and Clean Code.
Designed reusable components and optimized interface performance, improving load speed and UX.
Documented technical processes and workflows to standardize development practices.
Supervised NestJS backend service integration, ensuring efficient frontend-backend communication.
Mentored and onboarded new team members, fostering a collaborative development environment.
Developed and maintained React and Node.js solutions for document management tools.
Led migration from Create React App (CRA) to Vite.js, significantly improving build performance.
Managed infrastructure with Apache Web Server, Docker and Linux, ensuring high availability.
Built complete React Native mobile applications integrating REST APIs and Context API.
Led refactoring efforts aligned with SOLID principles, achieving a 25% reduction in system errors.
Developed a library to centralize judicial status queries, improving code reuse.
Built mobile applications with React Native, achieving a 20% efficiency improvement through optimized components.
Designed responsive web interfaces focused on UX/UI using CSS-in-JS.
Collaborated on REST API integration with the backend team.
Implemented unit and integration tests with Jest, ensuring code stability before each deployment.
Documented technical processes and configurations to ease onboarding of new developers.
Designed and developed corporate websites with WordPress, optimizing load times and usability.
Implemented and customized WooCommerce online stores, improving purchase experience.
Developed Android mobile applications tailored to specific client needs.
Provided maintenance and technical support for the company's digital platform.

billing-system.title: Billing System
billing-system.description: Full-stack billing platform built with Laravel + React + TypeScript, containerized with Docker. Handles invoicing, client management, and real-time reporting.

sass-surveys.title: SaaS Surveys
sass-surveys.description: Survey platform as a service. React frontend consuming a NestJS REST API with TypeScript. Multi-tenant architecture with analytics dashboard.

music-app.title: MusicApp
music-app.description: Cross-platform desktop music player built with Electron + React + Firebase. Real-time sync, playlist management, and offline capabilities.

task-management.title: Task Management System
task-management.description: Enterprise task manager with React frontend and .NET Core API. JWT authentication, role-based access control, and real-time notifications.

orbit.title: Orbit
orbit.description: React Native productivity app for managing daily routines and one-time tasks. Calendar view, real-time Firebase sync, Zustand + RTK Query state management.

fotostory.title: FotoStory
fotostory.description: Social photo-sharing platform with Google authentication, interactive gallery, likes, and real-time comments. Built with React + Vite and Firebase.

availability.title: Available for new projects
availability.text: Open to full-time positions, freelance projects, and consulting. Based in Bogotá — remote-friendly worldwide.
